---
name: New Model Support (ClawGUI-Eval)
about: Request or track adding a new model to ClawGUI-Eval
labels: eval, new-model
---

## Model Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Model name | <!-- e.g. UI-TARS 2.0 --> |
| HuggingFace ID | <!-- e.g. ByteDance-Seed/UI-TARS-2.0-7B --> |
| Architecture family | <!-- e.g. Qwen2.5-VL-based, standalone Transformer --> |
| Coordinate system | <!-- [0,1000] / absolute pixels / [0,999] / [0,1] --> |
| Input order | <!-- vt (image first) or tv (text first) --> |
| System prompt required | <!-- yes / no / injected into user turn --> |
| Official paper / repo | <!-- link --> |

## Benchmarks to Support

<!-- Which benchmarks should this model run on? -->

- [ ] ScreenSpot-Pro
- [ ] ScreenSpot-V2
- [ ] UIVision
- [ ] MMBench-GUI
- [ ] OSWorld-G
- [ ] AndroidControl
